channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Queen Motlatle Showcases Isicholo Art Installation at German Museum
item.description: Queen Motlatle, a celebrated South African makeup, hair, and prosthetics designer, is expanding her artistic repertoire by stepping into the fine art arena. Renowned for her contributions to film, tel...

item.title: Nick Faldo urges Jon Rahm to resolve DP World Tour fines to secure Ryder Cup participation
item.description: Golf legend Nick Faldo has publicly encouraged Jon Rahm to settle his dispute with the DP World Tour in order to ensure his eligibility for next year’s Ryder Cup in Ireland. Rahm faces fines exceeding...

item.title: Lisa Kudrow Reflects on Feeling Overlooked During 'Friends' and Her Career Journey
item.description: Lisa Kudrow, best known for her role as Phoebe Buffay on the hit sitcom 'Friends,' recently shared her experiences of feeling overlooked during the show's success. In a conversation with The Independe...

item.title: Samia calls for fuel consumption cuts and price control amid global oil supply disruptions
item.description: In response to the rising fuel prices, President Samia Suluhu Hassan has called for immediate cost-cutting measures across government institutions and urged Tanzanians to remain calm. The global fuel ...

item.title: McDavid's Hat Trick Powers Oilers to 5-2 Win Over Sharks, Securing Top Spot in Pacific
item.description: Connor McDavid put on a dominant performance as the Edmonton Oilers triumphed over the San Jose Sharks 5-2, a victory that moved them into sole possession of first place in the Pacific Division. McDav...

item.title: Teacher in Siaya Faces Tensions Over Dowry After Being Rejected by Family
item.description: A teacher in Siaya, Kenya, has shared her emotional journey after being rejected by her family due to an unplanned pregnancy. After being kicked out in the middle of a rainy night with her newborn, sh...

item.title: Friendship and Adventures in Lalitha Ramanathan’s Kanmani and Co.
item.description: Lalitha Ramanathan’s book *Kanmani and Co.* welcomes readers into the lively fictional village of Maaripuram, located in Tamil Nadu. The story follows five spirited friends and a mischievous cat as th...

item.title: Political Manipulation and Internal Crises Threaten Nigeria’s Opposition Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: This piece by Zebulon Agomuo uses a biblical allegory to comment on Nigeria’s political landscape as the 2027 general elections draw near. It paints a vivid picture of how corruption, selfish ambition...

item.title: John Deere Reaches $99 Million Settlement Expanding Farmers' Right to Repair
item.description: John Deere has agreed to pay $99 million to settle a long-running class action lawsuit over farmers' right to repair their own equipment. The case, which has drawn attention for years across the agric...

item.title: Kenyan Woman in UK Earns KSh 17,000 for Sharing Homemade Chapati with Stranger
item.description: A Kenyan woman living in the United Kingdom recently caught attention online after she earned KSh 17,000 for cooking chapati for a stranger. The incident began when a TikTok user known as Unc Munchies...

item.title: PCO says Marcos health disinformation seeks to undermine government stability
item.description: Presidential Communications Office (PCO) Acting Secretary Dave Gomez announced on Thursday that disinformation spreading online about President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr.’s health is part of a co...

item.title: Pluck Global Construction Company Explains PPP Agreement at FGC Kano Amid Student Concerns
item.description: Pluck Global Construction Company has provided clarifications regarding its Public-Private Partnership (PPP) agreement with Federal Government College (FGC) Kano. The firm responded to protests from t...

item.title: How a USA-Iran War Could Affect Kenya’s Environment and Insurance Sector
item.description: The article by Francis Maina, Deputy Director at Minet Risk Solutions in Kenya, explores how a possible conflict between the United States and Iran would have ripple effects reaching as far as Kenya. ...

item.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Steady voter turnout as State votes in single-phase polls
item.description: Voting for the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections began on April 9 across all 140 constituencies in the State. Over 2.7 crore voters, including 1.32 crore men, 1.39 crore women and 273 transgender persons...

item.title: Former Assistant Files Lawsuit Against Howard and Beth Stern Alleging Hostile Work Environment
item.description: Howard Stern and his wife, Beth Stern, are facing a lawsuit from Leslie Kuhn, a former employee who alleges she experienced a hostile work environment while working for the couple. Kuhn initially serv...

item.title: Iranian-Americans Seek Understanding and Support Amid Israel Conflict
item.description: Amidst the ongoing conflict between Israel and Iran, Iranian-Americans are expressing concern and urging their American friends and acquaintances to better understand the complexities of the situation...

item.title: Children Surprise Mum by Renovating Her Home with New Furniture
item.description: A mum from Kenya experienced an unforgettable moment when her children surprised her with a full renovation of her home. The heartwarming scene was caught on video as she stepped out of a white double...

item.title: Fil-Am Music Executive Touched by BINI's Coachella Rehearsal
item.description: A Filipino-American music executive expressed deep emotion, even shedding tears, after witnessing BINI's rehearsal for their upcoming performance at Coachella. The executive, whose name wasn't mention...

item.title: Understanding the Potential Benefits and Limitations of Cuddle Therapy
item.description: Cuddle therapy has emerged as a practice where individuals can book time with professional cuddlers to receive non-sexual, consensual physical touch. The sessions are structured to provide a safe envi...

item.title: Philippines’ Response and Preparedness During the Middle East Conflict and Ceasefire
item.description: After months of escalating conflict between the United States, Iran, and their allies in the Middle East, both sides have reportedly agreed to a ceasefire, bringing temporary relief to a volatile regi...
